Page.Width: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualWidth, FallbackValue=700}
Page.Height: {Binding RelativeSource={RelativeSource Mode=FindAncestor, AncestorType={x:Type ContentControl}}, Path=ActualHeight, FallbackValue=700}

Run.Text: Command has placed this trawler along one of the main known routes from Hawaii to Attu Island in an attempt to locate the American convoy.

Note: the trawler has also been placed in a known fishing ground frequented by Japanese fishermen. This is an effective technique to hide trawlers or small fast attack craft from radar observation! The Americans must close to visually ID every craft before they can open fire.

The Okean-class in Sea Power has a special attribute which allows it to remain undetected as a Neutral trawler until enemy forces close to very close range for VID. Let's leave the trawler in its current location and see if it's able to locate any enemy forces for now.
